purpose: QA-driven minimum rerun for the preferred Canny eye-only robustness set. Retest seed 711570105 after QA noted a faint right-edge vertical seam/background artifact, using slightly softer/shorter Canny guidance and explicit continuous-background wording.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic cinematic editorial portrait, natural skin texture with fine pores, subtle human skin asymmetry, realistic eyes with clean catchlights and visible iris detail, slightly brighter eye catchlights, gently open eye shadows, detailed natural hair, edge-guided but natural composition, coherent face silhouette, clean but not over-sharpened jawline, separated neck and shirt collar, tailored dark blazer over textured shirt, clothed shoulders, soft natural fill light, balanced exposure, calm plain continuous neutral interior background, seamless right image edge, no visible wall panel boundary, clean face with no painted marks, lifelike lens rendering
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed skin, beauty filter skin, airbrushed face, porcelain skin, over-sharpened skin, gritty skin, over-sharpened edges, dark edge halos, harsh outlines, black contour stains, distorted anatomy, extra fingers, missing fingers, deformed hands, crossed eyes, low resolution, blurry, watermark, text, colored blotches, paint marks, dim eye sockets, over-dark eyes, underexposed eyes, muddy shadows, crushed shadows, smeared jawline, warped collar edge, control map stains, right-edge seam, vertical seam, background panel line, border artifact, edge strip, window band, light bar, bare shoulders, strapless top, nude, unclothed torso

qa_focus: right-edge seam suppression versus seed 711570105 robustness note
edge naturalness after lower Canny strength
